summary: Implemented LLMProxyTab as a dedicated third tab in navigation. Created Proxy.razor component that extracts proxy configuration UI from LlmServers.razor. Added Proxy tab after Wiki and before LLM Servers in NavMenu. Proxy tab shows GPU hosts with proxy status per host, Apply Proxy button with busy-state, View Config button showing generated nginx.conf, and Copy URL button for proxy endpoint.
test_summary: Build verification pending - dotnet not available in environment. Changes follow existing codebase patterns. Unit tests for proxy functionality already exist in NginxProxyServiceTests.cs.
codebase_learnings: Uses Blazor server-side components with @inject directives. State management with private fields and dictionaries. Navigation via href attributes in NavMenu. Busy-state controlled by HashSet of host IDs. Clipboard API via JSRuntime. Existing test framework uses NUnit with [TestFixture] and [Test] attributes.
agent_retro: Created entire Proxy.razor from scratch as dedicated component. Had to navigate multiple edit attempts to get NavMenu ordering correct. Extracted all proxy-related UI (hosts table with proxy cell, Apply/ViewConfig buttons, docker detection rows, deployment form) from LlmServers.razor to new file.
